ddls:
CREATE TABLE "captcha_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Captcha configuration */,
  "sitekey" TEXT /* Sitekey associated with the Captcha configuration */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the Captcha widget (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the Captcha widget (e.g., normal, compact) */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the Captcha widget (e.g., pl, en, es) */,
  "tabindex" INTEGER /* Tabindex of the Captcha widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the Captcha (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captcha_configurations_sitekey FOREIGN KEY ("sitekey") REFERENCES sitekeys ("sitekey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captcha_configurations_theme FOREIGN KEY ("theme") REFERENCES themes ("theme_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captcha_configurations_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captcha_configurations_lang FOREIGN KEY ("lang") REFERENCES languages ("lang_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sitekeys" (
  "sitekey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sitekey */,
  "sitekey" TEXT /* Sitekey value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sitekey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sitekey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sitekey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sitekey (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain associated with the sitekey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sitekey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the theme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., normal, compact) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "lang_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "lang_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., pl, en, es) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the language was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lang_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user Captcha configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "sitekey" TEXT /* Sitekey associated with the Captcha configuration */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the Captcha widget (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the Captcha widget (e.g., normal, compact) */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the Captcha widget (e.g., pl, en, es) */,
  "tabindex" INTEGER /* Tabindex of the Captcha widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_configurations_sitekey FOREIGN KEY ("sitekey") REFERENCES sitekeys ("sitekey")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "sitekey" TEXT /* Sitekey associated with the analytics data */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the Captcha widget (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the Captcha widget (e.g., normal, compact) */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the Captcha widget (e.g., pl, en, es) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the Captcha */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the Captcha */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analytics entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_sitekey FOREIGN KEY ("sitekey") REFERENCES sitekeys ("sitekey")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics detail entry */,
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user interaction */,
  "user_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., solved, failed) */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Success status of the user interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics detail entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analytics detail entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_details_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captcha_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Captcha interaction */,
  "sitekey" TEXT /* Sitekey associated with the Captcha interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the Captcha */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the Captcha interaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., solved, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the interaction */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captcha_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captcha_interactions_sitekey FOREIGN KEY ("sitekey") REFERENCES sitekeys ("sitekey")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
